articles.author: Jordain Carney
articles.title: The Senate’s marathon elections debate is dividing Republicans, not Democrats - Politico
articles.description: So far discussions of the SAVE America Act are falling short of the “talking filibuster” conservatives are demanding.
articles.content: Well find out, you know? Senate Majority Leader John Thune said when asked if he knew if it would be enough to satisfy Trump, who has repeatedly urged Republicans to skirt the 60-vote filibuster to p… [+5778 chars]
